summary.content: AI Engineer with 3+ years of hands-on experience designing and deploying production-grade GenAI systems on AWS. Deep expertise in RAG architectures, LLM prompt engineering, hybrid retrieval, and agentic pipelines. Track record of delivering 38% search precision improvements through Dense Vector + BM25 retrieval with Cross-Encoder reranking, reducing LLM hallucinations, and building observable, drift-monitored AI systems at scale.

experience.title: Founding Engineer, Data and AI Applications
experience.company: Alphonso AI, Shipley Center for Innovation
bullets: Designed and deployed a production RAG system using hybrid Dense Vector + BM25 retrieval with Cross-Encoder reranking; optimized embedding strategies and relevancy thresholds to achieve 38% improvement in candidate match precision.
Implemented LLM hallucination controls within a Skill-Match scoring pipeline, enforcing top-N recommendation quality thresholds and establishing automated relevancy evaluation in production.
Built AWS (S3, Glue) event data pipelines with automated feature engineering and Grafana drift monitoring; operationalized engagement-scoring models with funnel-analysis instrumentation.

experience.title: Graduate Equity Research Analyst
experience.company: Student Managed Investment Fund, Clarkson University
bullets: Automated financial document extraction using the SEC EDGAR API and Google Vertex AI LLMs, reducing manual research time by 40% and enabling structured data pipelines for DCF and WACC models.
Built a social-sentiment NLP engine leveraging Semantic Text Analysis on Reddit and YouTube data to surface retail market signals and validate investment theses.
Co-managed a $650K equity portfolio delivering 51% total return, outperforming the S&P 500 by 2,600 bps through AI-assisted analysis and risk modeling.

experience.title: Data Science and ML Consultant
bullets: Deployed Uplift Modeling (CausalML) to score fans by persuadability and instrumented A/B testing with Power Analysis-driven sample sizing, validating a 12% revenue-per-ticket improvement.
Refactored PySpark ETL scripts processing 1M+ cross-channel events (GA4, CRM); applied AWS Glue partition pruning to reduce pipeline latency by 30%, accelerating model training cycles.
Built customer segmentation models using behavioral clustering and PCA, powering personalized campaign cohorts at production scale.

experience.title: Business Data Analyst
bullets: Developed and productionized a hybrid forecasting model (Prophet + SARIMAX) across 1,500+ SKUs, achieving 15% MAPE improvement on approximately 800K daily ERP transaction records.
Deployed GxP-compliant ML workflows on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure with real-time alerting, maintaining 99.9% uptime for mission-critical inventory-monitoring pipelines.
Automated KPI reporting via Oracle Analytics Cloud dashboards, freeing 12+ engineering hours per week previously spent on manual data preparation.

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Engineered scalable PySpark and Databricks data pipelines processing 10M+ rows from 30+ heterogeneous sources, reducing latency by 40% and improving downstream model training throughput.
Applied NLP and regression-based modeling to generate consumer insights for 10+ FMCG and Telecom clients across Middle East and Central Africa markets.
Built Power BI dashboards enabling 10+ stakeholders to self-serve campaign performance data for multi-million-dollar investment decisions.
